channel.title: Embeddings on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Embeddings on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: ai: Foundry Local 1.1: Live Transcription, Embeddings, and Responses API
item.description:
Foundry Local 1.1 adds live transcription, embeddings, a Responses API, a WebGPU plugin, and download cancellation. The update expands local model capabilities and adds controls for managing downloads.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog

item.title: dotnet: Vector Data in .NET – Building Blocks for AI Part 2
item.description:
Microsoft describes Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData as a .NET library that standardizes access to vector databases for semantic search scenarios.

  • Source: .NET
